hermitianLimitStatus.label: Hermitian entrywise limit
hermitianLimitStatus.reason: Entrywise limits of Hermitian matrices remain Hermitian.

quadraticFormLimitStatus.label: quadratic-form limit
quadraticFormLimitStatus.reason: For fixed c in C^N, the scalar c^*G_n c is a finite linear combination of entries of G_n, so it converges to c^*G c.

finitePsdConeClosureStatus.label: finite PSD cone closed
finitePsdConeClosureStatus.reason: Since c^*G_n c>=0 for every n and every c, the limit satisfies c^*G c>=0 for every c.  Hence G is positive semidefinite.

proof: Fix a finite dimension N and a vector c in C^N.
Entrywise convergence G_n->G implies c^*G_n c -> c^*G c.
Each c^*G_n c is nonnegative because G_n is PSD.
Therefore c^*G c>=0 for all c, which is exactly G>=0.
